disclosure_label: Northset contributed this fix and ran its declared checks. Contributor self-run. Not maintainer verification.

repo_policy_snapshot.ai_policy_summary: The repository requires a focused contribution, relevant tests and documentation, Conventional Commits, and no unjustified runtime dependency; no CLA, DCO, or AI prohibition was identified.

commands_declared: ln -s "$PWD/node_modules" /tmp/node_modules && cp vitest.config.ts /tmp/vitest.config.ts && npm test -- --config /tmp/vitest.config.ts --root "$PWD" --no-cache tests/loader.test.ts
limitations: Contributor self-run record of Northset's own contribution; not the maintainer's verification.
The receipt proves the declared automated checks only; maintainer review and merge remain independent human decisions.
